name: Tithill, Bishops Lydeard
questions: The annexe connects to the main house via a door from the conservatory into the kitchen — is it possible to permanently seal or lock that door so a smoker in the annexe cannot affect the main house? If so, is there any structural reason why this can't be done?

The private sewage treatment plant was installed by WCI in Wiveliscombe in 2015 — can the vendor provide the installation certificate, the latest emptying/service record, and confirmation it was assessed as compliant with the 2020 EA General Binding Rules?
Is there an annual maintenance contract in place for the STP, and what is the approximate annual cost?
What are the approximate annual oil heating costs? When was the boiler last serviced and is there a service record?
What is the LPG heating situation in the annexe — is it on a fixed tank or bottles, and what are the approximate annual costs?
Has the annexe been granted planning permission and building control completion certificate? Does it have its own council tax band?
We would like to arrange a viewing — what dates are available?
How close is the property to the railway line, and is there any noticeable noise inside the house?
What are the approximate dimensions of the rear garden?
Is the conservatory structurally part of the annexe or main house? Can it be given its own external access?
We would like to arrange a viewing — what dates are available in the next two weeks?

questions: Is the annexe shower a level-access/walk-in shower with no step, or does it have a step or bath?
What are the broadband speeds available — upload and download? Is it full fibre to the premises (FTTP) or fibre to the cabinet (FTTC)?
The internal garage access between annexe and main house — is there a fire door, or just a standard door? And can the garage be used as a garage, or is it part of the living space?
Is there full smoke/air separation between the annexe and main house when the garage door is locked — i.e. no shared ventilation?
Has the annexe been granted planning permission and building control approval? Does it have its own council tax band?
We would like to arrange a viewing — what dates are available?
What are the approximate dimensions of the rear garden?
We would like to arrange a viewing — what dates are available in the next two weeks?

questions: Does the lower ground floor have a separate external entrance — i.e. can it be accessed independently from outside without going through the main house?

Is there space and scope to add a kitchenette to the lower ground floor reception room to create a fully self-contained annexe?

What are the approximate dimensions of the rear garden?
We would like to arrange a viewing — what dates are available in the next two weeks?

name: Manor Road, Taunton
questions: The kitchen appears to be open/shared between the annexe and main house — is there any structural wall or door that could be reinstated to create full separation, ideally so the annexe kitchen operates completely independently? This is essential for our use case.

Following on from that, would the vendor consider a modest reduction in the asking price to reflect the cost of installing a partition wall and door to separate the two kitchens (approximately £2,000–4,000)?
The annexe shower has a small step — is there space to remove the cubicle and create a fully level wet room? What are the approximate room dimensions?
What gas boiler serves the main house, and is the annexe on the same heating system or independent?
We would like to arrange a viewing as soon as possible — this is a high priority for us. What dates are available this week or next?
What are the approximate dimensions of the rear garden?
We would like to arrange a viewing — what dates are available in the next two weeks?
